description_long: This cabinetry set features a combination of tall pantry cabinets, wall-mounted cabinets, and base cabinets, all finished in a rich wood veneer with a warm brown tone. The countertop is a light beige marble or stone surface, providing a contrasting yet complementary look. Integrated into the cabinetry are a stainless steel sink with a drying rack, a modern stovetop, and an oven, as well as a prominent metallic range hood above the cooking area. The upper cabinets have double doors, while the base cabinets include multiple drawers and doors for storage. The handles are sleek and metallic, adding a contemporary touch to the overall design. The cabinetry is designed for a kitchen environment, offering ample storage and workspace.
description: A modern kitchen cabinetry set with wood veneer finish, marble countertop, integrated appliances, and metallic handles. Features tall, wall, and base cabinets for versatile storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cabinetry layout, including tall pantry, wall, and base cabinets, marble countertop, sink, stovetop, oven, and range hood.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the cabinetry and the protruding range hood, with minimal detail visible.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the arrangement of cabinets and the countertop surface, with the range hood and stovetop centrally located.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cabinetry's depth and the alignment of the upper and lower cabinets.
attribute_cabinet_type: kitchen cabinet set (base cabinet, wall cabinet, tall pantry cabinet)
attribute_door_configuration: double door and single door with drawers
